case_title: ARCHSTONE-SMITH COMMUNITIES, LLC VS. JASON JOYCE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOYCE, JASON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE-SMITH COMMUNITIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOYCE, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFT. VACATED ON 3/8/06 . $1,543.67 RENT, $495.00 COSTS, $3,471.60 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,510.27, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE-SMITH COMMUNITIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOYCE, JASON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
